  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    DualEosComparison
    Compares thermodynamic property predictions between two equations of state.
    DualEosComparison.ComparisonResult
    Holds comparison results for a single T-P condition.
    DynamicProcessHelper
    Helper that converts a sized steady-state ProcessSystem into a dynamic simulation by auto-creating transmitters and PID controllers with sensible defaults.
